DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Morgan Simpson, Esq. 213-232-3128 Moon Law Group for Plaintiff.
Natalie Fujikawa, Esq. 916-830-65520 GRSM for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms. Fujikawa contests and presents arguments. Mr. Simpson responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALBECO, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant ALBECO, Inc's demurrer is OVERRULED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
